Category: Hospitality & Tourism: Hotels, Tourism, Travel Agencies, Food & Beverage
Who is this for: Hotel managers, front desk staff, concierge personnel, travel agents, tour operators, restaurant managers, guest relations coordinators, hospitality supervisors, booking agents, customer service representatives
Team or Dept this is for: Guest Services, Customer Experience, Operations, Front Office, Reservations, Food & Beverage, Marketing, Revenue Management
Description: How biased suggestions impact guest choices and perception.
Prerequisites: A basic familiarity with how hotels, travel agencies, or food and beverage businesses operate in day-to-day practice is all that is needed to get started with this course.
Learning objectives: By the end of this course, you will be able to identify common sources of bias in AI-generated recommendations and explain how these biases can influence guest choices and perceptions within the hospitality and tourism sector. You will also apply practical strategies to critically evaluate AI-driven suggestions, helping you make more informed decisions that better serve your guests and uphold trust in your organisation.
